title: Dozens of Democrats are skipping Netanyahu’s address to Congress
shortDescription: Multiple Democrats said it is inappropriate for Netanyahu to speak to a joint session Wednesday.

title: Trump wants to attack Harris – but he'll also have to defend himself
shortDescription: Donald Trump's vulnerabilities include a criminal conviction, his age and more as he faces off against Kamala Harris.

title: Trump shooter motive doesn't look political so far, despite GOP claims
shortDescription: Republicans like JD Vance said Thomas Crooks was inspired by Joe Biden to shoot Donald Trump, but evidence so far shows no clear motive or politics.

title: How Georgia's SB 189 cleared the way for mass voter challenges
shortDescription: Voter challenges, once an obscure practice, have become a mass movement in Georgia. Experts say a new election law will likely make the problem worse.

title: The 'Divine Nine' leaders push members to vote amid Harris' campaign
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris became a member of Alpha Kappa Alpha sorority Inc. in the 1980s and the 'Divine Nine' sororities are supporting her now.

title: Trump suggests Republicans should be reimbursed as Biden exits race
shortDescription: Trump says Republicans should be reimbursed for the money spent campaigning against Biden, who will not seek reelection in November.

title: False claim lowered Capitol flag is connected to Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: The Capitol flag is lowered upon the death of a sitting Congressional member, and often remains there until the day of their funeral.

title: Donald Trump says he wants to debate Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Former president is still raising a few red flags about a debate with his new opponent.

title: No, Trump didn't post gunshot 'took my entire ear off' | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump did not share the post. The image is a fabrication created by a social media user who identified it as satire.

title: Is US ready for Black woman president? Congressman isn't sure.
shortDescription: South Carolina Rep. James Clyburn helped win the White House for Biden. Now he's all-in for Kamala Harris.

title: No evidence Trump rally shooter had previous arrests | Fact check
shortDescription: A search of federal and state court records uncovered no criminal history for Thomas Matthew Crooks, who opened fire at Donald Trump's July 13 rally.

title: Kamala Harris leads Donald Trump 44% to 42% in a new poll
shortDescription: A new Reuters/Ipsos poll, conducted between July 22 and July 23, found Harris leading Trump 44% to 42% among registered voters.

title: Netanyahu taking meetings in the US. When will he speak to Congress?
shortDescription: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is scheduled speak before a joint session of Congress on Wednesday.

title: ‘That’s all he’s got?:’ Harris' husband slaps back at Trump
shortDescription: Second gentleman Doug Emhoff slapped back Donald Trump after the GOP nominee attacked Vice President Kamala Harris, his likely Democratic opponent.

title: Sen. Bob Menendez to resign from Senate
shortDescription: Sen. Bob Menendez will resign from the Senate after being found guilty in a federal corruption trial, including a charge of acting as a foreign agent.

title: The Senate is kickstarting a push to protect kids online. Here's what it would do.
shortDescription: The legislation would mark the first significant update to online privacy legislation since 1998.
